info.title: Security Guard HRM API
info.description:
# Security Guard HRM API Documentation

Multi-tenant Human Resource Management System for Thai security companies.

## Features
- **Leave Management**: Request, approve, and track employee leave
- **Leave Balances**: Track entitlements, usage, and adjustments
- **Leave Templates**: Quick leave request templates
- **Analytics**: Comprehensive reporting and analytics
- **Multi-tenant**: Secure data isolation per company

## Authentication
All endpoints require JWT authentication via Bearer token. Obtain a token by logging in via `POST /api/v1/auth/login`.

## Roles & Permissions
- **Guard**: Can submit and view own leave requests
- **Manager**: Can approve/reject requests, view team data, manage balances
- **Company Admin**: Full access to company data and settings
- **Super Admin**: Platform-wide access

## Response Format
All responses follow a consistent format:

**Success Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { ... }
}
```

**Error Response:**
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": {
    "message": "Error description",
    "code": "ERROR_CODE",
    "details": { ... }
  }
}
```

## Rate Limiting
API requests are rate-limited per user. Current limits:
- 100 requests per minute
- 1000 requests per hour

## Support
For API support, contact: dev@securityguard-hrm.com

tags.name: Leave Types
tags.description: Manage leave types (annual, sick, personal, etc.)

tags.name: Leave Requests
tags.description: Submit, approve, and manage leave requests

tags.name: Leave Balances
tags.description: Track and adjust employee leave balances

tags.name: Leave Templates
tags.description: Quick leave request templates for common scenarios

tags.name: Analytics & Reports
tags.description: Leave analytics, reports, and calendar views

get.description: Retrieve a list of leave types for the company. Optionally include inactive types.

post.description: Create a new leave type. Requires manager role or above.

get.description: Retrieve a specific leave type by its ID

put.description: Update an existing leave type. Requires manager role or above.

delete.description: Delete a leave type (soft delete by setting isActive to false). Requires manager role or above.

get.description: Retrieve leave requests for the authenticated employee
Retrieve a paginated list of leave requests. Requires manager role or above.
Retrieve a specific leave request. Requires manager role or above.

post.description: Approve a pending leave request. Requires manager role or above.

400.description: Request cannot be approved (already processed or cancelled)

post.description: Reject a pending leave request. Requires manager role or above.
Cancel a pending or approved leave request
Approve a leave request and assign replacement guards for affected shifts. Requires manager role or above.
Assign replacement guards for an approved leave request. Requires manager role or above.

get.description: Retrieve leave balances for the authenticated employee
Retrieve paginated leave balances. Requires manager role or above.

put.description: Update entitled days for an employee leave balance. Requires manager role or above.

post.description: Initialize leave balances for all or specific employees. Requires manager role or above.
Adjust a specific balance field with audit trail. Requires manager role or above.

get.description: Retrieve adjustment history for a specific balance. Requires manager role or above.
Retrieve paginated list of all balance adjustments. Requires manager role or above.

post.description: Adjust multiple leave balances in a single transaction. Requires manager role or above.
Create a new leave request template. Requires manager role or above.

put.description: Update an existing template. Requires manager role or above.

delete.description: Delete a leave template. Requires manager role or above.

post.description: Generate draft leave request data from a template

get.description: Retrieve key performance indicators for leave management. Requires manager role or above.
Retrieve leave utilization statistics. Requires manager role or above.
Retrieve leave calendar for a date range. Requires manager role or above.
